calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Karl S. Kronenberger, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs JOHN DOE 1, JOHN DOE 2, and JOHN DOE 3.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendants BLACK ROCK OPERATIONS, INC. or BLAIR OSBURN.
Witness: Leah Vulic appearing for Plaintiff sworn and examined.

Plaintiff' Exhibits:
1-Settlement Agreement and Release, fully executed
2-October 5, 2015 payment
3-October 31, 2015 payment
4-Plaintiffs' First Set of Requests for Admission
6-Settlement Agreement with Black Rock Operations History
7-Notice of Breach of Settlement Agreement dated 12/14/2015
8-Email from Karl Kronenberger to Blair Osburn dated 9/26/2015
9-Email from Blair Osburn to Virginia Sanderson dated 9/25/2015
14-Email from Karl Kronenberger to Blair Osburn dated 9/29/2015
18-Settlement Agreement and Release, incorrectly executed by Blair Osburn
33-Email from Karl Kronenberger to Blair Osburn dated 9/27/2015
39-Email from Karl Kronenberger to Blair Osburn dated 2/23/2016
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.
Court granted motion for admission of Exhibits of 1, 3, 4, 6 7 8 9 14 18 33 and 39.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiffs JOHN DOE 1, JOHN DOE 2, and JOHN DOE 3 and against Defendants BLACK ROCK OPERATIONS, INC. and BLAIR OSBURN as follows:

Principal $97,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $97,000.00

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-27-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
